content:
🔥 kugelaudio-open | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing high-quality, open-source text-to-speech synthesis for a wide range of European languages, enabling developers and researchers to create natural-sounding speech for various applications.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source text-to-speech for European languages • AR + Diffusion architecture • High-quality voice cloning capabilities • Outperforms leading commercial TTS systems (e.g., ElevenLabs) in human preference benchmarks
📖 Summary: KugelAudio is an open-source text-to-speech (TTS) system focused on European languages, leveraging an AR + Diffusion architecture. It aims to bridge the gap in high-quality TTS for underserved European languages, offering performance that rivals and surpasses leading commercial solutions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
